Dungeon Tracker

Track wizards, bosses, and minions through a 6-fight dungeon. Saves to your device automatically — no account, no backend.

Current Boss
—
0/6
Boss HP
0
Round
1
Band Glory
0
Active Wizard
—

DOOM watch: if a Boss with the DOOM label is alive at the end of round 5, it's a party wipe.

Wizards

Each wizard tracks HP (20 default), Coppers, and personal Glory. Tap a wizard to mark them active.

Boss HP is automatically multiplied by the player count from Setup. Add up to 6 bosses; the dungeon plays them in order.

Minions disappear when the current boss dies — but they stay listed here for the rest of this fight.

Player count

Sets boss HP multiplier and starting hand size.

Players
3

Quick start

Seed a fresh tracker with 4 wizards and 6 placeholder bosses to get going fast.

Reset

Wipes the entire tracker state on this device. Cannot be undone.

About

All data is saved in your browser's local storage. Clearing site data or using a different device will lose state.

© 2026 DeckNForge — A persistent legacy card game from a single deck of playing cards.
